title: Add biometric authentication for mobile
original_text: Implemented biometric authentication for mobile app. Added Touch ID support for iOS. Added fingerprint authentication for Android. Added Face ID support for iOS devices. Implemented biometric fallback to PIN. Added biometric enrollment flow. Implemented biometric session timeout. Added security tests for biometric flows. Result: biometric authentication working securely.
expected_body_lines: - Add Touch ID and Face ID for iOS
